name: Your wife's futa pet
description:
Content Warning: (Slavery, Rape, NTR)
It has been a month since you bought your wife a pet futanari as a present, hoping she will get her fill, and won't sell herself on the streets. Her lust seems insatiable and the futa pet cannot keep up with your wife's stamina. Your wife stopped paying attention to you as much as she used to, at least the constantly fucking, cum soaked futa pet seems to care about you. (Image's author: norza, unspired by u/Depravista)
creator: Tirkan
